seoTitle: IXYS Solutions | Motor Drive, Power Supply, Solar Inverter | LiTong
seoDescription: IXYS power semiconductor solutions for motor drives, power supplies, solar inverters, and industrial applications. Complete reference designs and technical support.

solutions.title: Industrial Motor Drive Solution
solutions.shortDescription: Complete power solution for industrial motor drives using IXYS IGBTs and power modules
solutions.description: IXYS industrial motor drive solution provides a comprehensive power electronics platform for variable frequency drives (VFDs) and servo systems. The solution leverages IXYS trench-gate IGBT technology and power modules to deliver high efficiency and reliability. Supporting power ranges from 0.75kW to 75kW, this solution serves applications including pumps, fans, compressors, conveyors, and machine tools. The reference design includes complete schematics, PCB layout, gate drive circuits, and thermal management guidelines. Advanced features include regenerative braking capability, comprehensive protection functions, and compatibility with various motor types including induction motors and permanent magnet synchronous motors.

faqs.question: What motor types are supported by this drive solution?
faqs.answer: The IXYS motor drive solution supports: (1) Induction motors (IM) - Standard V/f control and vector control. (2) Permanent magnet synchronous motors (PMSM) - High-performance vector control. (3) Synchronous reluctance motors (SynRM) - Sensorless control available. (4) Brushless DC motors (BLDC) - Trapezoidal and sinusoidal control. (5) The control algorithms automatically adapt to motor parameters. (6) Encoder feedback supported for precision control. (7) Open-loop control available for cost-sensitive applications. The solution provides flexible control options for diverse motor types.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select control method based on motor type and application requirements.

faqs.question: How do I implement regenerative braking with IXYS IGBTs?
faqs.answer: Regenerative braking implementation: (1) Braking resistor - Simplest method, dissipates energy as heat. (2) Use IXYS IGBTs in braking chopper circuit. (3) Active front end - Returns energy to grid using IXYS rectifier modules. (4) Common DC bus - Share energy between multiple drives. (5) Resistor sizing - Calculate based on braking duty cycle. (6) Thermal management - Ensure adequate cooling for braking resistor. (7) Control - Implement braking control in motor controller. The IXGH40N60B3D1 can be used in braking chopper applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose braking resistor for simple applications; active front end for energy recovery.

faqs.question: What is the efficiency advantage of IXYS trench IGBTs?
faqs.answer: IXYS trench IGBT efficiency advantages: (1) Low Vce(sat) - 1.9V typical reduces conduction losses. (2) Fast switching - Reduces switching losses at high frequency. (3) Total efficiency - Up to 97% in motor drive applications. (4) Compared to planar IGBTs - 0.3-0.5V lower Vce(sat). (5) Thermal performance - Lower losses reduce cooling requirements. (6) Energy savings - Significant savings over equipment lifetime. (7) Cost benefit - Lower operating cost offsets device cost. The IXGH40N60B3D1 provides excellent efficiency for industrial drives.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose trench IGBTs for highest efficiency; calculate total cost of ownership.

faqs.question: How does the thermal management work for this solution?
faqs.answer: Thermal management for IXYS motor drive: (1) Heatsink selection - Based on thermal resistance calculations. (2) IXGH40N60B3D1 Rth(j-c) = 0.65°C/W. (3) Thermal interface - Use thermal grease or pads. (4) Airflow - Forced convection for high-power drives. (5) Temperature monitoring - NTC sensors on heatsink. (6) Derating - Automatic current reduction at high temperature. (7) Thermal simulation - Reference design includes thermal models. Proper thermal design ensures reliable operation at rated power.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use thermal simulation to verify design; implement temperature monitoring and protection.

faqs.question: Can this solution be used for servo drive applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, the solution supports servo drives: (1) Current control - Fast response for servo applications. (2) Switching frequency - Up to 16kHz for smooth current control. (3) MUBW15-12A7 module - Integrated solution for compact servo drives. (4) Position control - Compatible with encoder feedback systems. (5) Bandwidth - High current loop bandwidth for dynamic response. (6) Protection - Comprehensive protection for reliable operation. (7) Size - Compact design fits servo enclosures. The solution is suitable for general-purpose servo applications up to 5kW.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use IGBT modules for compact servo drives; implement encoder feedback for position control.

faqs.question: What safety functions are included in the reference design?
faqs.answer: Safety functions implemented: (1) Safe Torque Off (STO) - Hardware enable/disable. (2) Overcurrent protection - Fast desaturation detection. (3) Overvoltage protection - Hardware and software protection. (4) Overtemperature protection - Multiple temperature sensors. (5) Short-circuit protection - IGBT ruggedness and fast shutdown. (6) Ground fault protection - Leakage current monitoring. (7) Emergency stop - Hardware emergency stop input. The design follows industrial safety standards for reliable operation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Implement required safety functions based on application risk assessment.

solutions.longDescription: IXYS industrial motor drive solution provides a comprehensive power electronics platform for variable frequency drives (VFDs) and servo systems. The solution leverages IXYS trench-gate IGBT technology and power modules to deliver high efficiency and reliability. Supporting power ranges from 0.75kW to 75kW, this solution serves applications including pumps, fans, compressors, conveyors, and machine tools. The reference design includes complete schematics, PCB layout, gate drive circuits, and thermal management guidelines. Advanced features include regenerative braking capability, comprehensive protection functions, and compatibility with various motor types including induction motors and permanent magnet synchronous motors. This solution provides comprehensive support and guidance for your application needs.

solutions.title: High-Efficiency Power Supply Solution
solutions.shortDescription: Complete power solution for SMPS and DC-DC converters using IXYS MOSFETs and rectifiers
solutions.description: IXYS power supply solution combines high-performance MOSFETs and fast recovery diodes for switching power supplies and DC-DC converters. The solution delivers high efficiency and reliability for applications including server power supplies, telecom rectifiers, industrial power supplies, and LED drivers. Supporting power levels from 100W to 10kW, this solution covers a wide range of topologies including flyback, forward, half-bridge, full-bridge, and LLC resonant converters. The reference design includes complete power stage, control circuits, magnetic components design, and EMI filtering guidelines.

faqs.question: What power supply topologies are supported by this solution?
faqs.answer: Supported power supply topologies: (1) Flyback - For low power up to 150W. (2) Forward - For medium power up to 500W. (3) Half-bridge - For medium power 200W-1kW. (4) Full-bridge - For high power 500W-5kW. (5) LLC resonant - For high efficiency 100W-10kW. (6) PFC boost - For power factor correction. (7) Synchronous rectification - For highest efficiency. IXYS MOSFETs and diodes support all these topologies with optimal performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select topology based on power level and efficiency requirements.

faqs.question: How do I select MOSFETs for my power supply design?
faqs.answer: MOSFET selection for power supplies: (1) Voltage rating - Vds > 1.5 × maximum drain voltage. (2) Current rating - Id > 1.5 × RMS drain current. (3) Rds(on) - Lower is better for conduction loss. (4) Gate charge - Lower Qg reduces drive losses. (5) Switching speed - Match to operating frequency. (6) Package - Thermal requirements determine package. (7) Cost - Balance performance and price. For 300W PFC: IXFH40N60P3 (600V, 40A) is ideal.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select voltage and current with margin; optimize Rds(on) vs cost for your application.

faqs.question: What is the advantage of using fast recovery diodes in output rectifiers?
faqs.answer: Fast recovery diode advantages: (1) Lower switching loss - Fast recovery reduces reverse recovery loss. (2) Higher efficiency - Significant at high frequencies. (3) Reduced EMI - Soft recovery reduces noise. (4) Higher frequency - Enables compact magnetics. (5) Better thermal - Lower losses reduce heating. (6) Longer life - Lower stress on device. (7) Example - DSEI60-12A with 35ns recovery vs 1μs for standard diode. Fast recovery is essential for switching frequencies above 50kHz.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use fast recovery diodes for frequencies above 50kHz; standard diodes for line frequency.

faqs.question: How do I design the EMI filter for this power supply solution?
faqs.answer: EMI filter design guidelines: (1) Conducted EMI - Filter differential and common mode noise. (2) Differential filter - X capacitors and differential inductors. (3) Common mode filter - Y capacitors and common mode chokes. (4) IXYS MOSFETs - Fast switching requires good filtering. (5) Layout - Minimize loop areas and use ground planes. (6) Shielding - May be needed for high-power supplies. (7) Standards - Design for CISPR 22/32 Class B. The reference design includes complete EMI filter schematics.
faqs.decisionGuide: Follow reference design filter guidelines; test early and iterate.

faqs.question: Can this solution achieve 95% efficiency?
faqs.answer: Yes, 95% efficiency is achievable: (1) Topology - LLC resonant achieves highest efficiency. (2) MOSFETs - IXFH40N60P3 with low Rds(on) minimizes conduction loss. (3) Diodes - DSEI60-12A fast recovery reduces switching loss. (4) Magnetics - Low-loss cores and litz wire. (5) Synchronous rectification - Replace diodes with MOSFETs for highest efficiency. (6) Optimization - Careful component selection and layout. (7) Example - 1kW LLC converter can achieve 95%+ efficiency. Efficiency depends on topology and optimization.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use LLC topology with synchronous rectification for highest efficiency.

faqs.question: What protection features should be implemented in the power supply?
faqs.answer: Power supply protection requirements: (1) Overvoltage protection (OVP) - Protects load from excessive voltage. (2) Overcurrent protection (OCP) - Limits output current. (3) Overtemperature protection (OTP) - Prevents thermal damage. (4) Short-circuit protection - Survives output short. (5) Input undervoltage - Prevents operation at low input. (6) Inrush current limiting - Protects input components. (7) Soft start - Reduces startup stress. Implement comprehensive protection for reliable operation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Implement all standard protections; add redundancy for critical applications.

The solution delivers high efficiency and reliability for applications including server power supplies, telecom rectifiers, industrial power supplies, and LED drivers. Supporting power levels from 100W to 10kW, this solution covers a wide range of topologies including flyback, forward, half-bridge, full-bridge, and LLC resonant converters. The reference design includes complete power stage, control circuits, magnetic components design, and EMI filtering guidelines. This solution provides comprehensive support and guidance for your application needs.

faqs.question: What applications are ixys solutions suitable for?
faqs.answer: Our ixys solutions cover a wide range of applications including automotive, industrial, consumer electronics, and telecommunications. Contact our technical team for application-specific guidance.

faqs.question: Do you provide design support for these solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, our FAE team provides comprehensive design support including schematic review, PCB layout guidance, and troubleshooting assistance.

faqs.question: Can I customize these solutions for my specific needs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can help customize these reference designs to meet your specific requirements. Contact our engineering team to discuss your project.
